steps.title: Write the budget inequality
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the number of attendees. The total cost is the fixed venue fee plus the cost per attendee:
$$40+9.50a \leq 300$$

steps.title: Find the largest whole count
steps.content:
Subtract $40$ from both sides and divide by $9.50$:
$$9.50a\leq 260$$
$$a\leq \frac{260}{9.50}$$
$$a\leq 27.368$$The attendee count must be a whole number, so round down to avoid exceeding the budget. The answer is 27.
